CTA & Form Copy Matrix

Final reference document for Indo Yachts CTA banners and popup contact forms. All copy has been reviewed, em dashes removed, and approved for implementation.

Final — Ready for Development

Form Structure (All Pages)

The same form fields are used across all popup forms. Only the header copy changes.

Form Fields
Your Name
Phone Number
Email Address
Group Size (dropdown)
Budget Per Week (dropdown)
Dates you're considering, destinations that interest you, or anything else that helps us personalize your recommendations.

Form Behavior

Required fields: Name, Email, Group Size

Optional fields: Phone, Budget, Tell Us More textarea

Focus state: Background shifts from #F5F5F5 to #FFFFFF with #B8A878 gold border

Hidden field: source value changes per page (e.g., "fleet-index", "yacht-dunia-baru", "destination-raja-ampat")

Button Text Reference

Primary Action
Get Recommendations →
Fleet Index, Journal Index, Guides Index
Availability Check
Check Availability →
Individual Yacht Pages
Planning Action
Plan Your Voyage →
Destinations (all), Itineraries (all)
General Inquiry
Get in Touch →
About, Services
Content Pages
Start Planning →
Individual Journal Articles, Individual Guides

Index Pages

Fleet Index

Fleet Index
/yachts
Get Recommendations →
Banner Copy
Not sure which vessel is right?
Our charter specialists know every yacht personally. Share your vision and we'll match you with the perfect vessel for your Indonesian adventure.
Popup Form Header
Personal Service, Fast Response
Let's Find Your Yacht
Our specialists know every vessel and respond within hours. Tell us what you're looking for and we'll handle the rest.

Destinations Index

Destinations Index
/destinations
Plan Your Voyage →
Banner Copy
Not sure where to explore?
From Raja Ampat's reefs to Komodo's dragons, we've sailed every route. Let us help you choose.
Popup Form Header
We've Sailed Every Route
Let's Plan Your Voyage
Tell us what draws you, whether it's diving, wildlife, culture, or relaxation, and we'll recommend the perfect charter destination for you.

Itineraries Index

Itineraries Index
/itineraries
Plan Your Voyage →
Banner Copy
Not sure which itinerary is right?
Our specialists have been crafting custom yacht itineraries in Indonesia for over a decade. Share your dates and interests and we'll craft the perfect route tailored for you.
Popup Form Header
Tailored to You
Let's Design Your Itinerary
Every charter is customizable. Tell us your interests and timeframe and we'll create something extraordinary.

Individual Pages

Individual Yacht Page

Individual Yacht
/yachts/[yacht-slug]
Check Availability →
Banner Copy
Interested in Chartering [Yacht Name]?
Reach out for instant availability verification and full assistance crafting your dream charter.
Popup Form Header
Inquiry: [Yacht Name]
Check Availability
We'll verify [Yacht Name]'s availability within hours and help you plan every detail of your charter.

Dynamic Content Note

[Yacht Name] is replaced dynamically with the vessel name (e.g., "Dunia Baru", "Aqua Blu").

Hidden field value: source="yacht-[slug]" (e.g., "yacht-dunia-baru")

Individual Destination Page

Individual Destination
/destinations/[destination-slug]
Plan Your Voyage →
Banner Copy
Ready to explore [Destination]?
Tell us your dates and interests. We'll craft a personalized itinerary for your [Destination] voyage.
Popup Form Header
Explore [Destination]
Plan Your [Destination] Charter
Share your dates and group size and we'll match you with the ideal yacht and itinerary for [Destination].

Dynamic Content Note

[Destination] is replaced dynamically with the destination name (e.g., "Raja Ampat", "Komodo", "Banda Sea").

Hidden field value: source="destination-[slug]" (e.g., "destination-raja-ampat")

Individual Itinerary Page

Individual Itinerary
/itineraries/[itinerary-slug]
Plan Your Voyage →
Banner Copy
Interested in this itinerary?
Share your preferred dates and we'll find the perfect yacht for your customized itinerary.
Popup Form Header
Itinerary: [Itinerary Name]
Plan This Voyage
We'll gladly confirm which yachts are best suited for this route and available for your dates. We'll provide a personalized quote and help ensure the best fit for you, then work on customizing the voyage to your exact preferences.

Dynamic Content Note

[Itinerary Name] is replaced dynamically with the itinerary name (e.g., "Raja Ampat 10-Night", "Komodo Explorer").

Hidden field value: source="itinerary-[slug]" (e.g., "itinerary-raja-ampat-10-night")

Informational & Content Pages

About Page

About
/about
Get in Touch →
Banner Copy
Ready to Begin?
Every extraordinary voyage starts with a conversation. Share your vision and let us show you what's possible.
Popup Form Header
Let's Connect
Start a Conversation
Tell us what you're looking for, whether you're ready to book or just beginning to explore.

Services Pages

Services
/services/*
Get in Touch →
Banner Copy
Questions about our services?
From charter planning to special requests, our team is here to help with every detail.
Popup Form Header
We're Here to Help
How Can We Assist?
Questions about our services, special requests, or ready to start planning? We're at your service.

Journal Index

Journal Index
/journal
Get Recommendations →
Banner Copy
Ready to start planning?
Our team has answered thousands of charter questions over more than a decade. We're here to help you plan the perfect Indonesian expedition.
Popup Form Header
Personal Service, Fast Response
Let's Find Your Yacht
Our specialists know every vessel and respond within hours. Tell us what you're looking for and we'll handle the rest.

/guides
Get Recommendations →
Banner Copy
Ready to explore?
Our team has over a decade of experience matching charterers with the perfect yacht and itinerary.

Personal Service, Fast Response
Let's Find Your Yacht
Our specialists know every vessel and respond within hours. Tell us what you're looking for and we'll handle the rest.

Individual Journal Article / Guide

Individual Article or Guide
/journal/[article-slug], /guides/[guide-slug]
Start Planning →
Banner Copy
Inspired to explore?
Our team has sailed these waters for over a decade. Let us help you plan your own Indonesian adventure.
Popup Form Header
Turn Inspiration into Reality
Let's Plan Your Adventure
Tell us what inspired you and we'll help you experience it firsthand.

Technical Implementation Notes

Popup Modal Styling

Overlay: background: rgba(10, 22, 40, 0.85); backdrop-filter: blur(4px);

Modal: White background, max-width 520px, oxblood accent bar (40px wide, 3px tall) centered at top

Close button: 40x40px, positioned top-right, snow background on default, sand on hover

Animation: Fade in overlay (0.3s), slide up modal from 20px (0.4s)

Form Input Styling

Default: background: #F5F5F5; border: 1px solid transparent;

Focus: background: #FFFFFF; border-color: #B8A878;

Padding: 14px 16px

Font: Manrope, 14px (16px on mobile to prevent iOS zoom)

Placeholder color: #9A9A9A

Submit Button Styling

Default: background: #953334; (oxblood)

Hover: background: #722728; (oxblood-deep), arrow shifts right 4px

Text: Manrope, 11px, 600 weight, 0.1em letter-spacing, uppercase

Padding: 18px 32px

Success State

Icon: Checkmark circle, 56px, oxblood color

Title: "Thank You" (Cormorant Garamond, 28px)

Message: "We'll be in touch within 24 hours with personalized [yacht recommendations / availability / etc.]."

Close button: Oxblood, same styling as submit

Accessibility

Escape key: Closes modal

Click outside: Closes modal

Focus trap: First input receives focus after modal opens (400ms delay for animation)

Body scroll lock: overflow: hidden applied to body when modal is open
